rulings.Case Title: HPS DEVELOPMENT CO., LP VS. EMERALD MOVING & STORAGE INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday Dec. 18 , 2012. Line 3 - DEFENDANT EMERALD MOVING & STORAGE INC.'s MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. Deny - Striking not void, Defendant properly served on August 9, 2012 and failed to appear. Having had three months to obtain counsel. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: U.S. BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE FOR WAM VS. KIMBERLY KENNY
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday Dec. 18 , 2012. Line 6 - DEFENDANT KIMBERLY KENNY's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule 5 days to answer. Notice and complaint sufficiently allege cause of action per CCP 1161, CCP 1954 and San Francisco Rent Ordinance 37.9(a)(6). =(501/REQ)
